title: SimilarWeb Website Traffic Scraper
description: Provide a list of domains to scrape public SimilarWeb traffic and analytics data.

domains.title: Domains
domains.description: List of website domains to scrape (e.g. amazon.com). Enter domains without https:// or www.

maxResults.title: Max Results
maxResults.description: Maximum number of domains to scrape from the list.

proxyConfiguration.title: Proxy Configuration
proxyConfiguration.description: Proxy settings. Residential proxies strongly recommended for SimilarWeb.
